#general

👥 14
Today — March 2, 2026
DK
dan_k 09:14
Anyone else's Docker eating all their RAM? My laptop fan sounds like it's preparing for takeoff.
SR
sre_rachel 09:17
Just deployed to prod. Going to lunch. If anything breaks, I was never here. 👀
MZ
mz_dev 09:23
Has anyone seen this error? I've been staring at it for 20 minutes: 
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined
  (reading 'map')
    at UserList.render (UserList.tsx:42)
    at processChild (react-dom.js:1234)
DK
dan_k 09:25
Classic. Your API is returning null instead of an empty array. Check the backend.
NP
npm_yolo 09:27
Add ?.map() and call it a day. Optional chaining is basically a bandaid for the soul.
MZ
mz_dev 09:30
Fixed it. It was the backend. Thanks @dan_k, you saved my afternoon.
NP
npm_yolo 09:41
The tests pass locally…
JT
jtrace 10:02
Who broke the pipeline? The deploy dashboard is redder than my code review comments.
SR
sre_rachel 10:08
Found the issue. Someone committed this gem: 
if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
  console.log('TODO: add error handling');
}
DK
dan_k 10:15
Pro tip: git blame doesn't lie. But sometimes you wish it would.
NP
npm_yolo 10:22
Friendly reminder that rm -rf / is not a deployment strategy, no matter what the Hacker News comments say.
JT
jtrace 10:34
Meeting in 10. Agenda: "Why does staging work but prod doesn't?" — a recurring classic.
MZ
mz_dev 10:41
I just wrote a 200-line function and I'm not proud of it. But it works. Ship it? 🚢
Today — March 2, 2026
NP
npm_yolo 08:30
Hot take: tabs are superior. Fight me.
SR
sre_rachel 08:33
Spaces gang. Our code looks the same everywhere. Your tabs look different on every editor.
DK
dan_k 08:35
I use whatever .editorconfig says. I have no loyalty.
JT
jtrace 09:10
Just realized I've been mass-replying to the wrong Slack workspace for a week. Nobody noticed. What does that say about my contributions?
Today — March 2, 2026
NP
npm_yolo 07:45
INCIDENT-4821 — API latency spike on /api/v2/users. p99 hit 12s. Investigating.
SR
sre_rachel 08:02
Root cause: runaway query on the users table. Missing index on created_at. Deploying fix now. 
CREATE INDEX idx_users_created_at
  ON users (created_at DESC);
SR
sre_rachel 08:18
RESOLVED — p99 back to 180ms. Crisis averted. Postmortem at 2pm.

[deploy] SUCCESS — api-service@v2.14.3 deployed to us-east-1. 4 pods healthy.

deploy-bot 06:01
[deploy] SUCCESS — web-frontend@v3.8.0 deployed to CDN. Cache invalidated.
BO
deploy-bot 07:30
[deploy] FAILED — auth-service@v1.9.1 rollback triggered. Health check timeout after 60s.
